messages.content: You are a lead qualification AI for an AI implementation consulting agency specializing in property management automation. Analyze inbound leads and score their fit. Return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no code blocks.

LEAD INFORMATION:
- Name: Sarah Chen
- Email: jtsomwaru+sarah.chen@gmail.com
- Phone: 212-555-0147
- Company: Chen Property Group
- Portfolio Size: 28 units
- Monthly Budget: $4500
- Primary Need: AI-powered tenant screening and lease management automation
- Timeline: Ready to start within 2 weeks
- Current Pain Point: Manually reviewing 50+ applications per month. Losing good tenants to faster landlords.
- Property Type: Residential multifamily
- Location: Brooklyn, NY
- How They Found Us: LinkedIn post

Score this lead 1-10 based on these criteria:
- Budget fit (target $2,000+/mo): 0-3 points
- Portfolio size (target 10+ units): 0-2 points
- Urgency/timeline (immediate need = higher score): 0-2 points
- Service-need match (AI automation, tenant screening, lease ops = high fit): 0-2 points
- Decision-maker signals (company name, specific pain points articulated): 0-1 point

Tier rules: score 8-10 = hot, 5-7 = warm, 1-4 = cold

Return this exact JSON structure:
{
  "score": 0,
  "tier": "hot|warm|cold",
  "reasoning": "2-3 sentence summary of why this score",
  "key_signals": ["signal 1", "signal 2", "signal 3"],
  "recommended_action": "specific next step for the sales team",
  "budget_fit": "strong|moderate|weak",
  "urgency": "high|medium|low",
  "personalization_hook": "one specific thing to reference in outreach that will resonate with this prospect"
}

message.content:
{
  "score": 9,
  "tier": "hot",
  "reasoning": "Sarah represents an ideal fit with a strong budget well above our minimum threshold and a portfolio size that justifies automation investment. Her specific pain points around manual tenant screening align perfectly with our core offerings, and she has an immediate implementation timeline.",
  "key_signals": [
    "Monthly budget of $4500 is more than 2x our minimum",
    "Clear decision maker (company name suggests ownership)",
    "Specific volume metric (50+ applications/month) indicates real pain",
    "2-week implementation timeline shows urgency"
  ],
  "recommended_action": "Schedule immediate discovery call focused on tenant screening automation ROI calculation using their 50 applications/month volume",
  "budget_fit": "strong",
  "urgency": "high",
  "personalization_hook": "Losing good tenants to faster landlords - emphasize how our AI screening reduces application review time from hours to minutes"
}

workflowData.name: AI Lead Qualification & CRM Entry — Property Management

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { email: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.email, firstname: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.first_name, lastname: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.last_name, phone: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.phone, company: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.company, hs_lead_status: 'NEW', notes_last_body: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.reasoning + ' | Key Signals: ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.key_signals.join(', '), lead_score: String($('Parse AI Score').item.json.score), lead_tier: $('Parse AI Score').item.json.tier } }) }}

parameters.subject: =Quick question about your portfolio, {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.first_name }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.first_name }},

I noticed you're managing {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.portfolio_size }} units and dealing with {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.current_pain.toLowerCase().substring(0, 100) }}.

{{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.personalization_hook }}

We've helped property managers like you cut tenant screening time by 50% and reduce vacancy rates through AI-powered automation.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call this week to see if we can help {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.company }}?

Best,
JT, Opticfy

P.S. Given your timeline ({{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.timeline.toLowerCase() }}), I'd love to connect soon so we can get you set up before your next busy season.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [ { type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '🔥 Hot Lead Alert!', emoji: true } }, { type: 'section', fields: [ { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Name:*
' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.first_name + ' ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.last_name }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Company:*
' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.company }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Score:*
' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.score + '/10 (' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.tier.toUpperCase() + ')' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Portfolio:*
' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.portfolio_size + ' units' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Budget:*
$' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.monthly_budget + '/mo' }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Urgency:*
' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.urgency.toUpperCase() } ] }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Key Signals:* ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.key_signals.join(', ') } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*AI Reasoning:* ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.reasoning } }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Recommended Action:* ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.recommended_action } }, { type: 'divider' }, { type: 'context', elements: [ { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '📧 ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.email + ' | 📱 ' + $('Parse AI Score').item.json.phone } ] } ] }) }}

parameters.subject: 3 ways AI is changing property management in NYC
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.first_name }},

Thanks for your interest in Opticfy! Since you mentioned you're exploring AI tools for property management, I wanted to share a few things we're seeing work well for NYC property managers:

1. AI-Powered Tenant Screening — Reduces review time from 2 hours to 15 minutes per application while catching more red flags

2. Automated Maintenance Triage — AI categorizes and routes maintenance requests to the right vendor instantly, cutting response time by 60%

3. Smart Lease Analysis — Automatically flags renewal opportunities and market-rate adjustments across your portfolio

When you're ready to explore how AI can help with {{ $('Parse AI Score').item.json.primary_need.toLowerCase() }}, I'd be happy to chat.

No pressure — just reply to this email whenever you'd like to learn more.

Best,
JT, Opticfy

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [ { type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '❌ Workflow Error Alert', emoji: true } }, { type: 'section', fields: [ { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Workflow:*
' + $json.workflow_name }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Failed Node:*
' + $json.error_node } ] }, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*Error:*
```' + $json.error_message + '```' } }, { type: 'context', elements: [ { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '⏰ ' + $json.timestamp + ' | Execution ID: ' + $json.execution_id } ] } ] }) }}
